_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to identify external partners with common cyber operations interests.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-013 (LS, cosine: 0.464), LS-K-011 (LS, cosine: 0.446).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.525). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [common, cyber, external, identify, interests, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [build, business, cross, data, delivery, effective] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.889, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.027 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Ability to identify external partners with common cyber operations interests." and "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.489 ≈ STS 0.525 (gap 0.036). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ability] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [common, cyber, external, identify, interests, operations]. WIDAI-only: [build, business, cross, data, delivery, effective].
